title: Dime quién era Sanchicorrota
overview: Is it a bird, is it a plane? No, is the legend of Sanchicorrota a XV century bandit who stole from the rich and give to the poor. The search for his prints and his lost memory, between history and myth, just find, and there is little, shepherds, sheep, hunters, film sets, a military base...
